title: Gary Vaynerchuk
html: Stub. Entrepreneur and influencer. Cited in Yahir's earliest fiction 2020 03 06 short story as the avatar of "hustle-content that maybe just eases the unemployed-overweight 26-year-old behind the screen" — Yahir's earliest documented skepticism of -as-cope.

related.label: Don't aspire to make a living, aspire to make a difference
